creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #6)
Thanks,

$ pkg info -r '*alsa*'                                    
alsa-lib-1.1.2_2:
        ffmpeg-4.3.1_1,1
        openjdk8-8.265.01.1

At this point I have no preference between oss and alsa, I'm just happy I have working sound in Firefox again :)
